package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_split_two_index_one_cut: `strings.Split(...)[1]` when only the second segment is needed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario663Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := strings.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
